title: Milestone Camping 63970 1L Whistling Camping Kettle/Durable and Lightweight/Pouring Spout and Heat-Resistant Handle/Ideal for Camping, Fishing, Workshops and Garages
features: 1L WHISTLING KETTLE - This kettle is perfect to take on all camping trips and adventures. With its whistling function and single base, this stove kettle is ideal for camping, fishing, boats, workshops, and garages.
DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT – The kettle is constructed with sturdy aluminium which makes it very durable and lightweight – ideal to take travelling. The kettle measures at H 14cm x Dia. 16cm.

POURING SPOUT AND HANDLE – The ergonomic handle is heat resistant so you can use it safely and comfortably, without the worry of burning yourself. The pouring spout has been improved for 2021, with flame-resistant material added to the spout.
EVEN HEAT DISTRIBUTION - Heat distributes evenly throughout the whole kettle, so you can enjoy hot drinks with friends and family or use for washing up while camping.
MILESTONE CAMPING – Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. Visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description Previous page Travel Friendly Design Made from aluminium, the kettle is sturdy and suitable for travel without weighing you down. Even Heat Distribution The kettle's circular design & flat base ensure that heat is distributed evenly during boiling. Works on Stoves The kettle's design ensures it is safe and effective for gas and electric stoves. Whistling Spout The kettle's spout whistles when water is ready and features flame-resistant material for safety. Easy Pour Handle The handle's heat-resistant, ergonomic design makes pouring the kettle's contents safe and easy. Next page 1 Travel Friendly Design 2 Even Heat Distribution 3 Works on Stoves 4 Whistling Spout 5 Easy Pour Handle
